assertions.title: Traceability links match actual generated files

steps.action: POST /api/build then GET /api/traceability and verify each link file_path with test -f equivalent
steps.expected: All traceability file paths exist on disk
steps.observed: 31 of 33 unique file paths were missing (missing_file_paths_count=31)

commands: python3 check traceability file_path existence against /Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot

assertions.issues: Traceability matrix contains many links to non-existent files (e.g., trace/*.ex, lib/concurrent_*.ex, stale/old_component.tsx).

assertions.title: Step 8 codegen records implementation links

steps.action: Invoke build via contract path and fallback implemented path
steps.expected: Build endpoint succeeds and records implementation links for generated files
steps.observed: Contract path POST /api/projects/:path/build returned 404; fallback POST /api/build returned 200 but files_written remained [] and traceability did not change on rerun

assertions.issues: No evidence that Step 8 run recorded new implementation links for generated artifacts in this run.

assertions.title: Auto-linked file_path values point to existing files

steps.action: Iterate all traceability link file_path values after build and check filesystem existence
steps.observed: 31 missing file paths out of 33 unique paths

assertions.issues: Many auto-linked paths do not resolve to files under repo root.

assertions.title: API spec links point to route handler functions

steps.action: Inspect api-category links and validate route/controller-like paths plus function_name presence in target files
steps.expected: API links map to handler files and function_name matches function in file
steps.observed: 13 api path violations and 3 function_name violations (all due missing files)

commands: python3 regex checks for def/function names in linked files

assertions.issues: API trace links mostly point to non-handler or missing files, so handler/function mapping is not satisfied.

assertions.title: Entity spec links include type, migration, and implementation

steps.action: Check each entities traceability entry for required link-type trio
steps.expected: At least one entities entry contains type+migration+implementation
steps.observed: 0/7 entity entries had all required link types

commands: python3 per-entry link-type coverage analysis for entities

assertions.issues: Entity traceability coverage lacks required type and migration links.

assertions.title: Behaviour spec links include test links

steps.action: Check behaviours entries for both implementation and test link types
steps.expected: At least one behaviours entry has implementation+test

commands: python3 link-type coverage analysis for behaviours

assertions.issues: Behaviour traceability entries include implementation only; test links were absent.

assertions.title: Component and view specs link to correct file types

steps.action: Inspect components/views links for framework-consistent path/type and file existence
steps.expected: Components link to component files and views link to page/view files with valid paths
steps.observed: Components include missing trace/components.ex and stale/old_component.tsx; views include missing trace/views.ex

commands: python3 extension/path checks for components and views categories

assertions.issues: Component/view links are not consistently valid project file targets.

assertions.title: Re-running codegen updates stale links

steps.action: Temporarily modify api spec path (/api/tasks -> /api/tasks-renamed), run build again, compare traceability
steps.expected: Traceability updates file_path/function_name for changed spec and stale links are replaced/marked
steps.observed: Second build returned 200 with files_written []; traceability_changed=false

commands: compare traceability payload before vs after

assertions.issues: Rebuild did not update stale links after spec change.

assertions.title: Codegen for all 11 spec categories produces links

steps.action: Verify project has all 11 spec category files, run build, inspect traceability matrix category coverage
steps.expected: Every category has at least one entry with at least one link
steps.observed: All 11 categories present in specs and all 11 categories reported linked entries in matrix

frictions.description: Direct CLI build commands (`mix bro.build` and `mix run --no-start -e 'Mix.Task.run("bro.build")'`) failed in this shared runtime because port 4000 is already in use.
frictions.resolution: Used running API service and invoked POST /api/build for build-step validation instead of starting a second local app instance.

frictions.description: Contract build path mismatch: `POST /api/projects/:path/build` returned 404 while implemented build surface is `POST /api/build`.
frictions.resolution: Captured 404 evidence for contract path and executed build checks through `POST /api/build`.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-TAUTO-009), 8 failed (VAL-CROSS-021 and VAL-TAUTO-001/002/003/004/005/006/008). Primary failures were non-existent traceability file paths, missing required link-type coverage, and no traceability updates after rerun build.
